sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ الْمُوَظَّفُونَ فِي هَذِهِ الشَّرِكَةِ كَفَرِيقٍ وَاحِدٍ.
sentences.translation: Zaposlenici u ovoj firmi rade kao jedan tim.
sentences.translationEn: The employees in this company work as one team.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَاوَنُ الْجَمِيعُ لِحَلِّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ الصَّعْبَةِ بِسُرْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Svi sarađuju kako bi brzo riješili teške probleme.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone cooperates to solve difficult problems quickly.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَرِمُ كُلُّ فَرْدٍ رَأْيَ زَمِيلِهِ فِي الِاجْتِمَاعَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki pojedinac poštuje mišljenje svog kolege na sastancima.
sentences.translationEn: Every individual respects their colleague's opinion in meetings.

sentences.arabic: النَّجَاحُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ هُوَ سِرُّ تَقَدُّمِ هَذَا الْمَكْتَبِ.
sentences.translation: Kolektivni uspjeh je tajna napretka ove kancelarije.
sentences.translationEn: Collective success is the secret of this office's progress.
